---
title: "A Stroop Task Study Replication"
author: "Christina Fan, Alexia Nijgorodov, Daniella Cisorio, Diya Renjan"
format: revealjs
---

# Introduction

## Background
::: {.incremental}
- Stroop Task is a task designed to assess executive function, specifically inhibitory control.
- Blah blah 1
- Blah blah 2
:::

# Methods

## Stroop Task Design

- The task is designed to present participants with color words of various colors
- Congruency blah blah
- Reaction time blah blah


# Results

## Descriptives
- Mean reaction time is 12.78 seconds across all trials.
```{python}
#| echo: false

import numpy as np
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

trials = ["Trial 1", "Trial 2", "Trial 3"]
mean_RT = [16.34, 11.01, 10.98]

plt.figure()
plt.plot(trials, mean_RT)
plt.title("Figure 1: Changes in Mean Reaction Time Across Trials")
plt.xlabel("Trial")
plt.ylabel("Reaction Time (seconds)")
plt.show()
```

## 2-Way Repeated Measures Analysis
